text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 
160 
INSULIN_OONP_COPAY_OS 
LABEL: 
Insulin Copay Out-of-Network Pharmacy — Other days supply 
DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-payment amount for a day’s supply of the insulin drugs 
(other than one month) on this tier, using an out-of-network pharmacy (OONP). 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
12 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS files) 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
This variable is
